meta.title: Nordven | Software Lab
meta.description: Nordven is a software lab building websites, ERP and CRM platforms, and AI solutions for ambitious teams. Senior engineering, calm and durable software, delivered end to end in English and Spanish.
meta.keywords: software lab, software studio, web design, web development, Next.js, custom ERP, ERP development, CRM software, custom CRM, AI solutions, AI chatbot, AI agent, RAG, LLM, bilingual software, English Spanish

about.title: About Nordven
about.description: A senior software studio building websites, ERP, CRM, and AI products. Co-founded by Malik Fattaev (Software Developer) and Shohrukh Normaxmatov (COO). Small team, senior by default.

contact.title: Contact Nordven
contact.description: Start a conversation about your next website, ERP, CRM, or AI project. We reply within one business day in English or Spanish.

portfolio.title: Nordven Portfolio
portfolio.description: Selected work from Nordven: websites, ERP and CRM platforms, and AI products built end to end for teams across the US, Spain and Latin America.

hero.titleB: from the first pixel to the last deploy.
hero.subtitle: We design and build websites, internal ERP and CRM platforms, and the AI that runs inside them - as one team, on one timeline.

services.title: Three practices. One throughline.
services.subtitle: Every engagement starts with the same question: what would a calm, well-engineered version of this look like?

process.title: A short loop, repeated until it ships.
process.subtitle: No discovery theater, no 80-page decks. We commit to a small slice, ship it, and let the next slice be informed by what we learned.

steps.title: Frame
steps.body: One week to align on outcomes, constraints, and the smallest meaningful first release.

steps.title: Design
steps.body: Interface, data model, and infrastructure designed together - never in isolation.

steps.title: Build
steps.body: Weekly demos in a real environment. Pull requests, not status updates.

steps.title: Operate
steps.body: We stay on after launch: monitoring, iteration, on-call rotation if you want it.

items.label: Average time to first production deploy

cta.title: Want to know price or timeline?
cta.subtitle: Tell us a few sentences about the project. We will come back within one business day with a rough scope, a price band, and a timeline you can plan around.

websites.name: Websites
websites.short: Product and marketing experiences that load fast and age well.

detail.title: Websites that load fast and age well.
detail.lead: Marketing and product sites that feel calm to use and stay easy to maintain long after the launch party ends.

features.title: Engineered for speed
features.body: Built on Next.js with edge rendering and aggressive caching. Real Lighthouse scores in the high 90s, not screenshots from a staging server.

features.title: Designed in-house
features.body: Typography, motion and layout decided by the same team writing the code. Nothing gets lost in the handoff between Figma and ship.

features.title: Bilingual by default
features.body: Routing, content and SEO ready for English and Spanish from day one, with room to add more languages later.

features.title: Calm content model
features.body: Updates in markdown or a typed CMS. We hand you something a non-developer can actually run without paging us.

deliverables: Design system tied to your brand

erp.name: ERP & CRM
erp.short: Internal platforms that replace the spreadsheet sprawl and the SaaS chaos.
erp.tagline: The system your business actually runs on.

detail.title: Internal platforms your team will actually use.
detail.lead: We replace the spreadsheet sprawl and the SaaS chaos with one well-engineered system designed around how your operations really work.

features.title: Built around your operations
features.body: We model your real workflows first, then design the screens. No off-the-shelf abstractions that fight your team every day.

features.title: Owned by you
features.body: Source code in your GitHub, database in your cloud account. No per-seat fees that creep up every renewal cycle.

features.title: Roles done right
features.body: Multi-tenant and role-based from the start. Admins, managers and operators each see exactly what they need.

features.title: Reports that earn trust
features.body: Audit trails, exportable data and calm dashboards. The things that make finance and ops actually rely on the tool.

ai.name: AI Solutions
ai.short: Chatbots, agents, RAG search, analytics models, or AI built into the product itself - whatever the team actually needs.
ai.tagline: AI that earns its place on the team.

detail.title: AI that earns its place on the team.
detail.lead: Chatbots, internal agents, RAG search, or AI woven into the product itself - built to be measurably useful, not just to demo well.

features.title: Grounded, not hallucinated
features.body: Retrieval-augmented designs that cite their sources. We measure answer quality with an evaluation suite before anything ships.

features.title: Production guardrails
features.body: Cost caps, rate limits, prompt logs and clean fallbacks for the days the model misbehaves. Nothing surprises you in the bill or the inbox.

features.title: Built into the product
features.body: AI lives as a feature inside your software, not a chat widget bolted on. Users get answers in the place they were already going to ask.

features.title: Model-agnostic
features.body: We pick the right model for each job - Claude, GPT, open weights - and keep you free to switch later without rewriting the app.

deliverables: Use case definition with measurable goals

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: See how we build the IT future for dozens of our clients.

sandimas.body: Neighborhood pharmacy. We designed and built their website.

thespot.body: Real estate platform to search, list and rent homes. We built the website and the ERP behind it.

yolla.body: Morning breakfast delivery service. We built the website, an AI assistant and the ERP that runs operations.

airmax.body: Aircraft maintenance company. We built the website and the ERP for their operations.

about.title: A small, senior team. On purpose.
about.lead: Nordven is a studio of engineers and designers who have shipped together for years. We keep the team small so the people who scope your project are the same people who write the code and answer the on-call page.

values.title: Senior by default
values.body: Every person on your project has shipped production software for a decade or more.

values.title: One throughline
values.body: Websites, ERP & CRM, and AI under one team - no integration drama between vendors.

values.title: Calm by design
values.body: We optimize for software that does not page anyone at 2 a.m. - including us.

values.title: Outcomes we can name
values.body: Each engagement has a measurable outcome we can describe in a single sentence.

contact.title: Tell us about the project.
contact.subtitle: A few sentences is plenty. We will reply within one business day.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Thank you. We will be in touch shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email coo@nordvenlab.com.

validation.messageTooShort: A sentence or two helps us prepare.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: The page you were looking for has moved or never existed.
